_comment2: Copy this file to .grok-terminal.json in your project root and customize it for your needs.
_comment3: The MCP automatically searches upwards from the current working directory for this file.
_security_note: This file is your main security boundary. Be thoughtful about what you allow. The AI can only execute commands listed here (or their direct children).

projectShortcuts._comment: Define your most common commands here. The AI can then simply say 'run build' instead of typing the full command.
projectShortcuts._bun_examples: If you use Bun, you can add similar shortcuts:

_advanced._comment: Only enable allowRemoteMcpConnections if you want the AI to be able to connect to other MCP servers at runtime.
